_evidence.FY16: HERO_2016.txt L264-271 — '8.1 Mn units CUMULATIVE INSTALLED CAPACITY ACROSS FIVE WORLD-CLASS FACILITIES' (8.1 million -> 8,100,000)
_evidence.FY17: null — no stated total installed capacity. Only a plant-wise table (HERO_2017.txt L508-513: Gurgaon 2.1 + Dharuhera 2.1 + Haridwar 2.7 + Neemrana 1.1 + Vadodara 1.2^ + Villa Rica 0.08 Mn units/annum) where Vadodara is footnoted 'Capacity to be ramped up to 1.2 Mn'; no single disclosed total figure, so not summed/guessed.
_evidence.FY18: HERO_2018.txt L180-181 — 'production capacity of 91 lakh+ 2-wheelers, annually' (91 lakh -> 9,100,000)
_evidence.FY19: HERO_2019.txt L220-221 — 'a combined installed capacity of around nine million units of two-wheelers per annum' (nine million -> 9,000,000; note: 'This capacity will go up to 11 million units' once 8th plant operational — planned, not used)
_evidence.FY20: HERO_2020.txt L1245-1246 — Manufacturing Capital: 'Installed Capacity: 9.1 million two-wheelers annually' (9.1 million -> 9,100,000)
_evidence.FY21: HERO_2021.txt L957 — Manufactured Capital snapshot: '9.5 Annual Capacity (in million)' (9.5 million -> 9,500,000). Detailed text L4051-4052 states 'consolidating the overall capacity to 9.3 million for domestic plants' (9.3 million domestic only); used the company-wide capitals-snapshot figure for series consistency.
_evidence.FY22: HERO_2022.txt L581 — Manufactured Capital snapshot: '~9.5 million Annual Capacity' (9.5 million -> 9,500,000). Detailed text L4040 states 'overall capacity of 9.3 million for all' plants (9.3 million); used capitals-snapshot figure for series consistency.
_evidence.FY24: HERO_2024.txt L1685-1686 — '9.5 million units annual production capacity' (9.5 million -> 9,500,000)
_evidence.FY25: HERO_2025.txt L960-962 — 'our annual production capacity stands at approximately 9.4 million units' (9.4 million -> 9,400,000)
_evidence.FY23: HERO_2023.txt L1605, L542, L320 — Manufactured Capital snapshot: '9.5 million Total production capacity' (9.5 million -> 9,500,000)

_evidence.FY17: null — EICHER_2017.txt states only a forward-looking figure: L1869-1871 'By 2017-18, the total annual production capacity of your Company is expected to be 8,25,000 motorcycles' and L586-587 'be producing 8,25,000 motorcycles at Royal Enfield in 2017-18'. No current-year (FY2016-17) installed-capacity number is stated (L1913 only says capacity 'is nearly at its peak'); not used to avoid guessing.
_evidence.FY18: EICHER_2018.txt L2387-2393 — 'During 2017-18, the total production from all the three plants was close to the target capacity of 8,25,000 motorcycles.' (8,25,000 -> 825,000). Note: L1758-1761 says first phase of Vallam Vadagal takes 'Royal Enfield’s overall production capacity to 9 lac units per annum' (900,000) and L2407 'plans an annual production capacity of 9,50,000 motorcycles' in 2018-19 (forward-looking).
_evidence.FY19: EICHER_2019.txt L2641-2642 (font-shifted text decodes to) — 'Your Company’s total installed capacity across plants as on March 2019 was 9,00,000 motorcycles.' (9,00,000 -> 900,000). Total production was ~8,42,000 (L2645).
_evidence.FY20: EICHER_2020.txt L3016-3018 — 'With the addition of Phase-2 of Vallam Vadagal, total installed capacity of your Company has increased to 1.2 million motorcycles per annum.' (1.2 million -> 1,200,000). FY production ~6,80,000.
_evidence.FY21: EICHER_2021.txt L5351-5355 — 'EML currently has a combined installed capacity of 10 lakhs* across all manufacturing units.' (10 lakh -> 1,000,000)
_evidence.FY22: EICHER_2022.txt L3184 — Manufactured Capital: '12 Lakh motorcycles per annum capacity' (12 lakh -> 1,200,000)
_evidence.FY23: EICHER_2023.txt L2842-2843 — '3 world-class manufacturing sites in Chennai, India with 12 lakh annual manufacturing capacity' (12 lakh -> 1,200,000)
_evidence.FY24: EICHER_2024.txt L8457-8460 — 'three major manufacturing facilities at - Vallam Vadagal, Oragadam and Tiruvottiyur, with a combined production capacity of 1.2 million units a year.' (1.2 million -> 1,200,000)
_evidence.FY25: EICHER_2025.txt L5769-5770 — '12 Lakhs+ Motorcycle capacity across Indian units' (also L4334 '12 Lakhs+ annual manufacturing capacity') (12 lakh -> 1,200,000)

ola._evidencenote: OLA_2025.txt — Phase-1 INSTALLED capacity 1M units (commissioned during FY22), scalable to 4M. Applied to FY22-FY25 (phase-1 capacity has been flat since commissioning).
